hotspots.title: Trump-Xi summit amid Iran war tensions
hotspots.blurb: President Donald Trump's high-stakes meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing has dominated coverage, with discussions focusing on trade, Taiwan, and the ongoing Iran war. The summit is framed as a critical juncture for global stability, with both leaders seeking to de-escalate tensions while asserting their national interests.
hotspots.affect: This commands disproportionate attention due to the high-stakes geopolitical implications, the personal dynamics between Trump and Xi, and the potential for major policy shifts or conflicts.

hotspots.title: Nigel Farage’s £5m donation scandal
hotspots.blurb: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage is under investigation for failing to declare a £5 million donation from a cryptocurrency billionaire. The scandal has sparked outrage over transparency and ethical standards in UK politics, with critics accusing Farage of prioritizing personal gain over public trust.
hotspots.affect: This commands disproportionate attention due to the moral outrage over undeclared donations, the high-profile nature of Farage, and the implications for political integrity in the UK.

hotspots.title: AfD’s poll surge and leadership ambitions
hotspots.blurb: Germany's far-right Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) continues to gain traction in polls, particularly in eastern states like Sachsen-Anhalt, where it is poised to become the strongest party. The AfD's rise is framed as a threat to democratic norms, with critics warning of its nationalist, anti-immigration agenda and ties to Russia.
hotspots.affect: This commands disproportionate attention due to fears of democratic backsliding, the AfD's controversial policies, and its potential to reshape German politics.

hotspots.title: Kylian Mbappé vs. France’s far-right
hotspots.blurb: French football star Kylian Mbappé has sparked a national debate by publicly criticizing the far-right Rassemblement National (RN) party, warning of the consequences of its potential victory in the 2027 presidential election. The RN has hit back, accusing Mbappé of overstepping his role as a public figure and politicizing sports.
hotspots.affect: This commands disproportionate attention due to the high-profile nature of Mbappé, the moral charge of his criticism, and the polarized reactions from far-right leaders and the public.

hotspots.title: Manuel Adorni’s illicit enrichment probe
hotspots.blurb: Argentina's Chief of Cabinet Manuel Adorni is under investigation for alleged illicit enrichment, with prosecutors scrutinizing his personal finances, including cash payments for rentals and renovations. The scandal has intensified internal tensions within President Javier Milei's government and fueled public distrust.
hotspots.affect: This commands disproportionate attention due to the moral outrage over corruption allegations, the high-profile nature of Adorni, and the potential impact on Milei's government.
